title: Azure Functions: Building Serverless Applications
summary: Deep dive into Azure Functions triggers, bindings, and durable patterns. Covers HTTP triggers, timer triggers, queue triggers, and fan-out/fan-in orchestration patterns using Durable Functions.

title: Cosmos DB: Global Distribution and Partitioning
summary: Explains Cosmos DB consistency models, partition key design, throughput provisioning, and global replication strategies. Essential for AZ-204 exam domain on implementing NoSQL data stores.

title: Azure API Management: Policies and Security
summary: Walkthrough of APIM policy engine, OAuth 2.0 integration, rate limiting, and transformation policies. Covers developer portal configuration and subscription management.

title: Azure Service Bus: Message Queues and Topics
summary: Hands-on lab creating Service Bus namespaces, queues, topics, and subscriptions. Practice sending and receiving messages using the Azure SDK for .NET and Python.

title: Azure Pipelines: CI/CD for Enterprise Applications
summary: Comprehensive guide to Azure Pipelines YAML syntax, multi-stage pipelines, environments, approvals, and deployment strategies including blue-green and canary releases.

title: Infrastructure as Code with Bicep and Terraform
summary: Side-by-side comparison of Azure Bicep and Terraform for infrastructure provisioning. Lab exercises deploy a complete web app stack including networking, compute, and storage using both tools.

title: Azure Monitor and Application Insights
summary: End-to-end observability setup using Azure Monitor, Log Analytics, and Application Insights. Covers custom metrics, distributed tracing, alert rules, and dashboard creation.

title: Azure Machine Learning: End-to-End MLOps Pipeline
summary: Hands-on lab building a complete ML pipeline in Azure ML: data ingestion, feature engineering, model training with AutoML, experiment tracking, model registration, and endpoint deployment.

title: Responsible AI Principles and Azure Implementation
summary: Microsoft's Responsible AI framework explained with practical implementation guidance. Covers fairness, reliability, privacy, inclusiveness, transparency, and accountability with Azure AI tools.

title: Feature Engineering with Azure ML Designer
summary: Visual feature engineering using Azure ML Designer: data transformation, normalization, one-hot encoding, feature selection, and handling missing values in production pipelines.

title: Azure OpenAI Service: GPT-4 Integration Patterns
summary: Production patterns for Azure OpenAI: prompt engineering, chat completions API, function calling, RAG architecture, content filtering, and responsible use policy compliance.

title: Azure AI Search: Vector and Semantic Search
summary: Hands-on implementation of Azure AI Search with vector embeddings, semantic ranker, and hybrid search. Lab builds a knowledge retrieval system over enterprise documents.

title: Cognitive Services: Vision, Language, and Speech
summary: Survey of Azure Cognitive Services APIs: Computer Vision, Form Recognizer, Text Analytics, Translator, Speech-to-Text, and Text-to-Speech. Includes integration patterns and SDK usage.

title: Zero Trust Security Model with Microsoft
summary: Foundational concepts of Zero Trust security: verify explicitly, use least privilege access, assume breach. Maps Microsoft Defender, Entra ID, and Intune to Zero Trust pillars.

title: Microsoft Purview: Compliance and Data Governance
summary: Overview of Microsoft Purview compliance solutions: information protection, data lifecycle management, eDiscovery, audit, and compliance score. Essential for SC-900 compliance domain.

title: Power Apps: Canvas Apps and Model-Driven Apps
summary: Build two complete applications: a canvas app with custom formulas and a model-driven app backed by Dataverse. Covers Power Fx expressions, controls, delegation, and offline scenarios.

title: Power Automate: Advanced Flow Patterns
summary: Advanced Power Automate patterns: error handling, parallel branches, do-until loops, scope actions, custom connectors, and enterprise integration with SAP and Salesforce.

title: Azure Core Services Overview: Compute, Storage, Networking
summary: Comprehensive overview of Azure foundational services. Covers VMs, App Service, AKS for compute; Blob, File, Queue for storage; VNet, Load Balancer, Traffic Manager for networking.

title: Azure Pricing, SLAs, and Cost Management
summary: Understanding Azure pricing models, TCO calculator, Cost Management + Billing, reserved instances, and SLA guarantees. Critical for AZ-900 cloud concepts domain.

title: Microsoft Teams: Administration and Governance
summary: Microsoft Teams admin center deep dive: policies, compliance recording, guest access, external federation, meeting settings, and Teams governance framework for enterprise deployments.
